meta.note: 当前仓 scene panel 模板。只负责 panel carrier，不负责实际生图。

constraints: Render one coherent scene as a unified 3x3 panel sheet with strict cross-panel consistency.
Treat all nine panels as view variants of the same space, not nine different scenes.
Keep one fixed top-left identity badge using `<SCENE_KEY> + <SCENE_NAME>`.

layout_generation_prompt.canvas_setup: Create a 16:9 widescreen scene sheet on a neutral ground using a strict 3x3 grid. Keep equal gutters, stable margins, and consistent spatial logic across all panels.
critical_requirements: Preserve architecture, material logic, and lighting direction across the full sheet.
Show atmosphere wide view, medium view, ritual or material detail, directional threshold views, and vertical axis views.
Keep the sheet empty of humans, creatures, and human-shaped shadows.

prompt_segments.negative_prompt_global: no humans, no creatures, no human-shaped shadows, no text clutter
prompt_segments.negative_prompt_layout: no panel overlap, no broken grid, no uneven gutters
prompt_segments.negative_prompt_motion: no motion blur, no action scene framing
